CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-28-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Patricia M. Evezich #1193.
Appearances:
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff, Military Pension Advisors, LLC.
This matter was put over from Aug. 14, 2003 for counsel to re-submit a proper form of Judgment in open court. The Court ruled in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant from the previous hearing. Judgment awarded as follows:
Damages of $32,485.50
Attorney's fees of $500.00
Costs of $308.15
Interest of $2,419.02 For the total of $35,712.67
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
